mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_file(slides_name, file_name, training_class_id) VALUES(#{slidesName}, #{fileName}, #{trainingClassId})
mapper.select: SELECT course_file_id, slides_name, file_name, training_class_id FROM course_file WHERE course_file_id = #{courseFileId}
SELECT course_file_id, slides_name, file_name, training_class_id FROM course_file
